description: Cross-reference between VA Standards and Conventions and the pragmatic M standard. Filter to concern in [sac_says_use_but_not_portable, sac_says_avoid_but_portable] for portability gaps that VistA developers should review.

entries.name: BREAK
entries.notes: SAC forbids BREAK in production code; use ZBREAK during debugging only.

entries.name: JOB
entries.notes: JOB requires explicit IRMS/site approval; not for general use.

entries.name: XECUTE
entries.notes: XECUTE on user-supplied input is forbidden; restricted to controlled cases.

entries.name: ZINSERT
entries.notes: Source-modification at runtime forbidden in production.

entries.name: ZLOAD
entries.notes: Source-modification at runtime forbidden in production.

entries.name: ZREMOVE
entries.notes: Source-modification at runtime forbidden in production.

entries.name: ZSAVE
entries.notes: Source-modification at runtime forbidden in production.

entries.name: ZSYSTEM
entries.notes: Shell escape disallowed in VistA application code.

entries.name: $ZSEARCH
entries.notes: Direct filesystem access restricted; use FileMan APIs instead.

entries.name: $ZA
entries.notes: Vendor-specific device status; non-portable; SAC requires use of $DEVICE.
